productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Women Solid Red Sweater
description: Composition Red sleeveless sweater made of 100% cotton, that has a V-neckline, discreet hem along the armholds, ribbing along the neckline and the hemline, and Swarovski crystal embellishments above the hemline on the left Fitting Regular Wash care Delicate machine wash at 30 degrees using mild detergent Do not dry clean Do not tumble dry, wring, scrub or bleach Dry flat in shade Warm iron Do not iron directly on print/embroidery Enjoy the winter in style in this knit top from united colors of benetton. Pair this with jeans or skirts and sports shoes for unparalleled cool. Product is a size M on the model with height 5.8" and waist 26"
